top_signals.title: Barclays’ Cau Says Stocks Can Look Past Middle East Volatility
top_signals.summary: Investors should brace for more Middle East turmoil but resist the temptation to make major portfolio shifts as earnings growth remains the key driver for markets, according to Barclays Plc’s head of European equity strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EXCLUSIVE: Union Pacific, Norfolk Southern CEOs talk about the rail merger that could reshape the U.S. economy
top_signals.summary:
As the Big Boy steam locomotive thundered into Philadelphia for the USA 250 celebration, the CEOs of Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern talked about the proposed merger that could reshape the American supply chain.
